title: matisia bolivarii subsp. occidentalis
intro: Matisia bolivarii subsp. occidentalis, also known as the Occidental Matisia, is a plant species belonging to the family Malvaceae, commonly found in the Andean region of South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Matisia bolivarii subsp. occidentalis include its ability to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are typically used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of ailments.
